mention.missing_prompt: Void: You mentioned me, but you forgot the question.
Void: I can help, but I need an actual prompt after the mention.
config.set_style.forbidden: Void: Only admins are allowed to change my style pack.
Void: Tone control is restricted to admins.
config.set_style.reloaded: Void: Reloaded style pack `{stylePackName}` from `{stylePackPath}` and refreshed stock messages from `{systemMessagesPath}`.
Void: Updated my style pack to `{stylePackName}` from `{stylePackPath}` and reloaded messages from `{systemMessagesPath}`.
config.set_style.style_missing: Void: Reloaded stock messages from `{systemMessagesPath}`, but there was no style pack at `{stylePackPath}`.
Void: Message catalog refreshed from `{systemMessagesPath}`. The style pack at `{stylePackPath}` is missing.
command.unimplemented: Void: That command exists, but the implementation behind it does not.
Void: The command is present. The machinery behind it is not.
error.with_message: Void: The machinery hit an error: {errorMessage}
error.generic: Void: Something failed, and the error was annoyingly vague.
Void: Something broke, and I did not get a useful explanation.
provider.none_available: Void: No provider is available for you right now.
Void: I do not currently have an available provider for your request.
provider.missing_registration: Void: That provider name leads nowhere. `{providerName}` is not configured.
provider.access_denied.generic: Void: That provider is not available to you.
Void: Access denied for that provider.
permission.owner_codex.denied: Void: The owner Codex provider is restricted to the configured owner account.
Void: That lane is reserved for the configured owner account.
permission.local_llm.denied: Void: The local model is currently limited to admins and the configured owner.
Void: Access to the local model is restricted right now.
job.owner.awaiting_run_approval: Void: Owner job `{jobId}` is waiting. Approve it with `/approve-job job-id:{jobId}` to prepare the manual bundle.
Void: Owner job `{jobId}` is queued for manual handling. Use `/approve-job job-id:{jobId}` when you want the bundle generated.
job.owner.auto_queued: Void: Owner job `{jobId}` is queued. If it stays short and read-only, I will answer here. If not, I will hand it off to the fuller Codex flow.
Void: Owner job `{jobId}` is in motion. Small read-only work stays here. Bigger work gets handed off.
job.owner.queue_failed_dm: Void: I could not queue your request from `{channelName}`. Error: {errorMessage}
Void: The queue step failed for your request in `{channelName}`. Error: {errorMessage}
job.owner.worker_failed_dm: Void: Job `{jobId}` failed while `{providerName}` was handling `{command}`. Error: {errorMessage}
Void: The worker hit a failure on job `{jobId}` during `{command}` with `{providerName}`. Error: {errorMessage}
job.not_found: Void: There is no record of job `{jobId}`.
job.approval_forbidden: Void: You are not allowed to approve that job.
Void: Approval for that job is not available to you.
job.run_approved: Void: Job `{jobId}` is approved. The worker will pick it up on the next pass.
Void: Approval recorded for job `{jobId}`. The worker should handle it shortly.
job.post_approval.needs_response: Void: That job is waiting for post approval. Put the final response in the optional response field.
Void: I can post the result once you supply the final response in the optional response field.
job.post_approved: Void: Final reply posted for job `{jobId}`.
job.no_action_for_state: Void: Job `{jobId}` is in state `{jobState}`, so there is nothing to approve.
Void: No approval action is needed for job `{jobId}` while it is in `{jobState}`.
job.rejection_forbidden: Void: You are not allowed to reject that job.
Void: Rejection for that job is not available to you.
history.no_results: Void: No indexed history matched that query.
Void: I searched the archive and found nothing for that query.
history.results_intro: Void: Here are the relevant history hits:
Void: These are the archive results that looked useful:
summarize.no_messages: Void: There are no recent messages here to summarize.
Void: This channel is too quiet to summarize right now.
summarize.results_intro: Void: Here is a quick summary of the recent conversation:
Void: Brief summary of the recent messages:
reindex.forbidden: Void: Only admins are allowed to reindex the archive.
Void: Reindexing is restricted to admins.
reindex.excluded: Void: This channel is excluded from indexing.
Void: I am not configured to ingest this channel.
reindex.unsupported_channel: Void: This channel does not expose message history, so there is nothing to reindex.
Void: Reindexing is not supported here because there is no message history to read.
reindex.completed: Void: Reindexing complete. I walked {archivedMessages} messages: created {createdMessages}, updated {updatedMessages}, left {unchangedMessages} untouched, and indexed {indexedChunks} chunks.
Void: Archive sweep finished. I reviewed {archivedMessages} messages, created {createdMessages}, updated {updatedMessages}, skipped {unchangedMessages}, and produced {indexedChunks} chunks.
provider_status.intro: Void: Here is the current state of the configured providers:
owner_codex.handoff_notice: Void: This request needs the fuller Codex flow. Check `{handoffPath}` and `{debugPath}` in the local workspace.
Void: This one is leaving Discord. Continue from `{handoffPath}` and use `{debugPath}` for the trace.
